summary: Completed testing of @mention tagging feature in hive posts. Backend tests: 10/10 passed (100%). Frontend source code verification: All components correctly implemented with proper data-testid attributes. Frontend compiles without errors.
test_credentials: Dynamic test users created via API: TEST_MENTION_user1_*, TEST_MENTION_user2_*, searchtest_*
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mention feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: GET /api/mention-search?q={query} returns max 8 matching users with id, username, avatar_url. MENTION_RE regex @(\w+) extracts mentions. parse_and_notify_mentions creates MENTION notifications for each mentioned user (capped at 10). All 5 composer endpoints (now-spinning, new-haul, iso, vinyl-mood, note) call parse_and_notify_mentions after post creation. Frontend: MentionTextarea component provides @ autocomplete with data-testid='mention-dropdown' and data-testid='mention-option-{username}'. MentionText renders @mentions as clickable Links to /profile/{username} with data-testid='mention-link-{username}'. ComposerBar uses MentionTextarea for spin, haul, iso, and note caption fields. PostCards uses MentionText for all caption/content display. CommentItem has renderMentions function for comment text.

backend: test_mention_search_returns_users - Returns list with id, username, avatar_url
test_mention_creates_notification - MENTION notification created for mentioned user
test_mention_search_endpoint_exists - Endpoint reachable with correct format
test_mention_regex_pattern - Multiple mentions in text handled correctly
frontend_source_verification: MentionTextarea.js - Component correctly implements @ autocomplete with dropdown
MentionTextarea.js - Has data-testid='mention-dropdown' for dropdown container
MentionTextarea.js - Supports keyboard navigation (ArrowUp, ArrowDown, Enter/Tab, Escape)
MentionTextarea.js - Inserts selected username at correct cursor position
MentionText.js - Renders @mentions as clickable Links to /profile/{username}
ComposerBar.js - Uses MentionTextarea for spin, haul, iso, note caption fields
PostCards.js - Uses MentionText for all post types (NOW_SPINNING, NEW_HAUL, ISO, NOTE, etc.)
CommentItem.js - Has renderMentions function that renders @mentions as Links
Frontend compiles with only minor warnings (React Hook dependencies in MessagesPage.js)

backend_endpoints.GET /api/mention-search?q={query}: Requires auth, returns max 8 users matching query prefix, fields: id, username, avatar_url
backend_endpoints.parse_and_notify_mentions: Extracts @mentions using MENTION_RE regex, creates MENTION notification for each (max 10), updates post with mentions array

frontend_components.MentionTextarea: Drop-in replacement for Textarea with @ autocomplete, fetches /api/mention-search on @{query}
frontend_components.MentionText: Renders text with @mentions as clickable profile Links
frontend_components.ComposerBar: Uses MentionTextarea for all caption fields (spin, haul, iso, note)
frontend_components.PostCards: Uses MentionText for caption/content in NOW_SPINNING, NEW_HAUL, ISO, NOTE, WEEKLY_WRAP, default cards
frontend_components.CommentItem: Has renderMentions function for comment text

mention_feature_implementation_verified.data_flow: User types @ → MentionTextarea fetches /api/mention-search → dropdown shows suggestions → user selects → mention inserted → post created → parse_and_notify_mentions called → notifications sent → PostCards renders MentionText with clickable links
